plugin.name: Folder Mapper
plugin.description: Scan a folder tree and map file metadata, paths, permissions, and dates into an Excel workbook.
title: Folder Mapper
description: Map file metadata for an entire folder tree into Excel, with a preview of the first rows inside the app.
dialog.browse.title: Select Folder To Export
dialog.error.title: Missing Input
summary.success: Exported {row_count} rows for {folder_name}. Previewing the first {preview_count} rows.
